titleStmt.title: SII 38.559: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 559. (A.R. No. 559 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the two detached slabs fixed into the main gōpura, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Built in. Seems to record the assignment of taxes like kaḍamai, āyam, kāśukaḍamai paṭṭikuṟṟam, and other taxes accrued on three pieces of land (located at) Taṇṇiyālattūr, Arumbaḷḷi and Puḻichchatūr by the chief Pañchanadivāṇa Nīlagaṅgarayaṉ for a temple caused to be built by a certain Mudaliyār at (a place) Paḷḷipaḍai-agaram in Taṇṇiyālāttur in Surattūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam.
This inscription is in characters of the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . coḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūrkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu curattūrnāṭṭu maṭappuṟam taṇṇiyālattūril mutaliyār paḷḷipaṭaiakarattu Eḻuntaru
kkum Uṭalāka nām viṭṭa Ittaṇṇiyālattūril tirukkolcūḻtaṭi Uḷvaripaṭṭi viṭṭanilam Oruveliyum Ikkoṭṭattu Innāṭṭu Arumpaḷḷiyil taṭi Uḷvarippaṭi viṭṭa nilam Oru ve
curattūr nāṭṭu puḻiccalūr piṟivāṉ veṭṭuvāṉ paṭṭil nammuṭaiya pūntoṭṭaṅkaḷilt tiruṉantavaṉamāka viṭṭa Āṟṟaṅkarai kollai Oḻukiṉpaṭi kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟiṉāl nilam Eṭṭu māvum Āka ni
ṅkakum Iṉṉāḷ mutal Arimapāṭikāvalil Ūrkāviṟ pura koḷḷum nālil Oṉṟu nikki Allāta ṉām koḷḷum kaṭamai Āyam kācu kaṭamai paṭṭikuṟṟam kāttikaippaccai
ka Iṭṭeṉ pañcanativāṇa nilakaṅkaraiyaṉeṉ tiru māheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.559 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
